nodes.doc: Semantic version parsing and comparison (SemVer 2.0.0).

nodes.label: strings
nodes.doc: Case conversion and word helpers (camel/snake/kebab/Pascal, capitalize, words, ellipsis).

nodes.label: template
nodes.doc: Logic-less Mustache templating (Mustache spec, via github.com/cbroglie/mustache).

nodes.label: time
nodes.doc: Timestamp formatting/parsing and duration parsing (Go time, UTC).

nodes.label: toml
nodes.doc: TOML parse and stringify (TOML 1.0 via pelletier/go-toml/v2).

nodes.label: uuid
nodes.doc: Unique identifiers and random tokens (v4 random, v7 time-ordered, plus raw random hex/tokens).

nodes.label: vcs
nodes.doc: Version-control queries for the current working tree.

nodes.label: yaml
nodes.doc: YAML parse and stringify (YAML 1.2 via gopkg.in/yaml.v3).

nodes.label: bindings-generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates the Go host bindings (std -> host/gen) from std.Module declarations.

nodes.label: build
nodes.doc: Compiles one artifact: the host binary, or the container image under the `container` charm.

nodes.label: buzz-check
nodes.doc: Type-checks the standalone Buzz with the upstream `buzz` toolchain (--check).

nodes.label: buzz-run
nodes.doc: Type-checks the standalone Buzz with magus's own embedded engine ($MAGUS buzz).

nodes.label: ci
nodes.doc: Runs lint, build, test, and the coverage-badge freshness gate read-only; the affected/pipeline anchor.

nodes.label: ci-shard
nodes.doc: Translates a `magus affected --plan` (read on stdin) into GitHub Actions shard-matrix outputs; the gha charm writes $GITHUB_OUTPUT, otherwise the matrix is only previewed.

nodes.label: config-generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates the CLI config-flag plumbing (cmd/magus/gen) from internal/config/config.go.

nodes.label: coverage
nodes.doc: coverage runs the suite with per-package coverage and rewrites the assets/coverage.svg badge.

nodes.label: docs-generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates the committed docs Markdown (module reference + man pages).

nodes.label: format
nodes.doc: Regenerates, then formats Go, tidies `go.mod`, and prettifies the docs.

nodes.label: generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates every *-generate sibling, then gates on drift (exclusive, scoped to cwd).

nodes.label: go-build
nodes.doc: Compiles the version-stamped magus binary.

nodes.label: image-build
nodes.doc: Under the cd charm, build+push+sign both static and CGO images unconditionally.

nodes.label: image-scan
nodes.doc: Scans the image with trivy; the rw charm writes SARIF and gates on HIGH/CRITICAL.

nodes.label: lint
nodes.doc: Formats first, then golangci-lint, go vet, govulncheck, markdownlint.

nodes.label: man-generate
nodes.doc: Renders the man pages (roff) into manpage/gen.

nodes.label: md-generate
nodes.doc: Renders MAGUS.md via `magus describe graph`.

nodes.label: postflight
nodes.doc: Renders the insight report (hotspots, affinity, ownership, trend) to stdout and, in GitHub Actions, appends it to the job step summary.

nodes.label: preflight
nodes.doc: Gates the build on workspace health by running `magus doctor`.

nodes.label: release-build
nodes.doc: Builds one release binary for one platform.

nodes.label: release-sign
nodes.doc: Signs dist/SHA256SUMS with the Ed25519 key in the MAGUS_SIGNING_KEY secret (see cmd/magus-utils/sign.go), then self-verifies the signature against the embedded release pubkey (internal/releasekey) before the release goes out — a cheap regression guard, safe to run here (unlike setup-magus, which can't depend on the magus source tree since it's reused by arbitrary external repos).

nodes.label: spells-generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates the compiled built-in spell bytecode (internal/spell/gen).

nodes.label: test
nodes.doc: Formats first, then runs the Go test suite.

nodes.label: watch
nodes.doc: Rebuilds on every debounced change until interrupted; fs.watch BLOCKS, try/catch keeps it alive.

nodes.label: ci
nodes.doc: 'ci' is the conventional anchor that `magus affected ci` keys off.

nodes.label: ci
nodes.doc: The anchor `magus affected ci` keys off; fans out lint/build/test after format.

nodes.label: generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates MAGUS.md and fails on drift.

nodes.label: md-generate
nodes.doc: Renders MAGUS.md (target catalog plus graph) from this magusfile.

nodes.label: pgo-generate
nodes.doc: Regenerates default.pgo, the Buzz VM's PGO profile.

nodes.label: build-graph-explorer
nodes.doc: build_graph_explorer bundles js/graph-explorer.js (d3-force + d3-zoom) into the committed website/gen/graph/explorer.js - the graph analog of build_playground_editor.

nodes.label: build-playground
nodes.doc: build-playground rebuilds the WebAssembly interpreter the playground page loads: TinyGo compiles ../cmd/buzz-playground straight to website/gen/playground/buzz.wasm and the matching wasm_exec.js glue is copied beside it.

nodes.label: build-playground-editor
nodes.doc: build_playground_editor bundles the vendored CodeMirror editor into the committed website/gen/playground/editor.js — the editor analog of build_playground's committed buzz.wasm.

nodes.label: buzz-test
nodes.doc: buzz-test runs scribe's unit tests (the `test "..." {}` blocks in scribe.buzz) through `magus buzz`, in --embedded mode with the pure magus modules registered so scribe's markdown/encoding imports resolve.

nodes.label: ci
nodes.doc: 'ci' is the conventional anchor `magus affected ci` keys off; it fans out lint/build/test, each of which waits for the render via generate.

nodes.label: generate
nodes.doc: generate renders the site and refreshes MAGUS.md, then gates on drift: a clean checkout only goes dirty when gen/ or MAGUS.md actually changed (i.e.

nodes.label: md-generate
nodes.doc: md-generate renders MAGUS.md (the target catalog + dependency graph) via `magus describe graph`, parsed statically from this magusfile so it stays in lockstep with the project's targets.

nodes.label: serve
nodes.doc: serve watches ../docs and re-renders gen/ on change — handy for local docs work.
